summary: Validated Alpha has no accepted P0 or P1 blockers across full test, content validation, determinism, save/load, command parity, batch auto-run, Web build, Storybook build, desktop security/package smoke, E2E core flows, and start-to-victory replay coverage. No accepted P0/P1 blocker was found; remaining findings are non-blocking warnings and known M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context.

tests_run.result: format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.
architecture, sim determinism, root Vitest, and web Vitest passed; 41 root test files / 307 tests and web 1 file / 4 tests.
M1, M2, M3, M6 map candidate, and M6 scenario sets validated successfully.
Node/Worker parity passed for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, M5 playable loop, and M6 Alpha; M6 Alpha terminal outcome was victory.
3650-day baseline passed with p50 61700 ns, p95 142000 ns, p99 254600 ns, save byte length 9980, save 2913000 ns, and load 2231200 ns.
Vite production build passed; only the existing >500 kB chunk warning remained.
Storybook build passed; only chunk-size and plugin-timing warnings remained.
Electron security preferences passed; preload bridge and IPC surface were restricted as expected.
Desktop package smoke passed and produced the packaged Windows x64 artifact directory.
Playwright passed 11 / 11 Chromium tests, including M6 Alpha accessibility and viewport checks.
Batch artifact hash 99d64950 validated with 3 scenarios, 2 seeds, 6 runs, and 0 P0/P1 candidates.
1 file / 5 tests passed for Alpha victory, continued-play, defeat, save/load, malformed terminal command rejection, and Node/Worker parity.

decisions: No accepted P0 or P1 blocker was found in determinism, save/load, command parity, security, package-boundary, batch auto-run, start-to-victory, or E2E coverage.
M5 PASS_WITH_LIMITS context was rechecked and preserved; no new blocker was accepted from known M5 limits.
This validation changed only allowed task, state, registry, and message evidence files and did not implement gameplay features or alter roadmap/gate documents.
risks: pnpm build:web and pnpm storybook:build emitted only size / plugin timing warnings, which are non-blocking P2 build-health concerns.
Node emitted MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warnings during test execution for deterministic worker fixtures; the tests still passed and no product blocker was identified.
requested_action: Review the no-P0/P1 validation evidence. If no accepted P0/P1 blocker remains, accept or route onward; if a real P0/P1 is found, return REQUEST_CHANGES or BLOCKED and name the responsible writer.
